title: ActiveCampaign vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign and AWeber. See pricing, features, and which email marketing platform suits your needs best.
intro: ActiveCampaign and AWeber are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign is a feature-rich CRM and automation powerhouse, while AWeber prioritizes simplicity with a freemium model. This guide will help you choose the right tool based on your budget, technical expertise, and business goals.
choose_a_if: You need advanced CRM and lead scoring capabilities for sales teams
You want SMS marketing integrated with email campaigns
You're willing to invest in a more comprehensive platform for better ROI
choose_b_if: You're starting out and want to use email marketing for free up to 500 contacts
You prefer simplicity and ease of use over advanced features
You run a blog or small business and need RSS-to-email automation

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is more powerful for businesses requiring CRM, advanced automation, and lead management, while AWeber is better for beginners and small creators who want simplicity. ActiveCampaign has higher ratings on G2 (4.5 vs 4.2) and offers more enterprise-grade features.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or AWeber?
faq.a: AWeber is cheaper for small businesses thanks to its free tier supporting up to 500 subscribers at no cost. Both platforms start at $15/month for paid plans, but AWeber's freemium model makes it the more budget-friendly option initially. As your list grows, pricing depends on your subscriber count.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support list exports and imports. You can export your contacts from AWeber and import them into ActiveCampaign. Most email marketing tools allow CSV exports, making the migration straightforward, though you may need to manually recreate complex automation workflows.
